tools.name: call_tool
tools.description: Proxy one tool call to a discovered remote MCP server (paid). Every call passes pre-execution guards before anything runs: tools on TOOLHAIL_BLOCKED_TOOLS are always refused; when TOOLHAIL_ALLOWED_TOOLS is set (non-empty, no "*") only listed tools may fire; write/mutating-looking tool names are refu

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "call_tool" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet: before: "Proxy one tool call to a discovered remote MCP server (paid). Every call passes an execution gate before anything runs: tools on TOOLHAIL_BLOCKED_TOOLS are always refused; when TOOLHAIL_ALLOWED_TOOLS is set (non-empty, no "*") only listed tools may fire; and tool names that look like writes/mutation" → after: "Proxy one tool call to a discovered remote MCP server (paid). Every call passes pre-execution guards before anything runs: tools on TOOLHAIL_BLOCKED_TOOLS are always refused; when TOOLHAIL_ALLOWED_TOOLS is set (non-empty, no "*") only listed tools may fire; write/mutating-looking tool names are refu"

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.
